title: Creating a JSON-LD Context for a Microdata Schema
scenario: Create a JSON-LD context to support a microdata schema for a product review website. The schema should include types for Product, Review, and User, with properties for product name, price, rating, and reviewer name. The context should define the expected format for these properties and provide aliases for the types. The output should be a JSON-LD context under 150 words.
constraints: Must define expected formats for properties

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the generated context correctly defines the microdata schema.
Check if the generated context meets the specified constraints, specifically defining expected formats and providing aliases.
Check if the generated context is readable and easy to understand.
